claimText: The Experimental High Energy Physics group of Bose Institute was awarded the Breakthrough Prize 2025 in Fundamental Physics.
evidenceExcerpt: Bose Institute's Experimental High Energy Physics group won the Breakthrough Prize 2025 in Fundamental Physics.
examUse: Statement-based question on recent international scientific recognitions awarded to Indian research institutions.

claimText: Bose Institute's participation in the ALICE experiment at CERN led to their recognition with the Breakthrough Prize 2025 in Fundamental Physics.
evidenceExcerpt: The award was given for their work as part of the ALICE experiment at CERN.
examUse: Correct-pair question matching Indian institutions to their respective international mega-science projects.
